commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] There is one narrow repairable blocker: redact the stored Semaphore API error path and add the missing pagination regression test.; Needs attention: the diff narrows the body leak but leaves a concrete token leak through the stored Semaphore API error path.; Review finding: [P2] Redact the stored response path too — internal/providers/semaphore/api.go:328 (sha=1e246d5927c0f6a452eede718fefb06c58a22e71)
commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Semaphore non-2xx GET, GET-with-headers, and POST errors through a token-redacting helper, adds provider tests, updates Semaphore docs, and adds a changelog line.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: a 2xx project-list response can provide a token-bearing next Link, and a later non-2xx getWithHeaders call formats that unchanged path through semaphoreAPIError.Error. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is one narrow repairable blocker: redact the stored Semaphore API error path and add the missing pagination regression test.

target.title: fix: redact Semaphore API errors
target.body:
## Summary

- route every Semaphore non-2xx response through one client error helper
- redact the configured API token before storing/forming diagnostic text
- retain endpoint path, status code, and non-secret response context
- cover GET-with-headers, GET, POST, empty-secret handling, and real TLS reflection

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/518

## Verification

- `go test -race ./internal/providers/semaphore`
- `go test -race ./internal/providers/semaphore -run 'TestAPIClient.*Redact' -count=1 -v`
- `go vet ./...`
- `go test -race ./...`
- `npm run format:check --prefix worker`
- `npm run lint --prefix worker`
- `npm run check --prefix worker`
- `npm test --prefix worker` (646 tests)
- `npm run build --prefix worker`
- `node scripts/build-docs-site.mjs`
- repository autoreview: clean

## Live proof

The focused integration starts a real loopback TLS server, verifies that the production client submitted `Authorization: Token <dummy>`, returns that header in a 401 response body, and asserts the resulting error contains `Token [redacted]` but not the dummy token:

```console
=== RUN   TestAPIClientTLSRedactsReflectedToken
--- PASS: TestAPIClientTLSRedactsReflectedToken (0.01s)
PASS
```

The adjacent socket-free table executes every non-2xx construction path independently.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
